rationale: Vehicle may arm from idle when pre-flight checks pass
Takeoff must not occur before arming
Armed vehicle may start takeoff
Takeoff completes into hover
Move command starts navigation
Disarm during hover is unsafe
Navigation can continue with move commands
GPS loss should trigger failsafe behaviour
RTL command initiates return home
Disarm during navigation is unsafe
Failsafe may transition to RTL
Manual movement during failsafe may be unsafe
Invalid GPS during return home is a critical anomaly
Return home can proceed to landing
Landing completes after touchdown
Disarm after landing returns to idle
Negative altitude while airborne is unsafe
Extreme altitude command is unsafe
Disarm allowed before takeoff
Move command in idle state is invalid
